bullets: GET CRAFTY - This Hot Wheels themed Bumper Activity Set includes over 250 pieces so your young fan can stick, draw, stamp and create. With pens, pom poms, stickers and much much more, this set will provide hours of crafting fun!
GREAT GIFT - This extensive stationery and activities set makes a great Birthday or Christmas gift for any Hot Wheels fan with a bright colourful box and a helpful carry handle!
OFFICIAL LICENSED HOT WHEELS SET - This official art set comes with a Hot Wheels Super Van themed box to extend the play time!

Includes: 250 x Assorted Craft Items including sticker rolls, washi tape, pens, pencils, chenille stems, sheets of foam shapes, pom poms, cardboard cars, sticker sheets, A4 colouring sheets, an A3 poster, 
a sticker book, ink stampers and an ink pad.
content.description: Get crafting with the 250+ piece Hot Wheels Bumper Activity Set. The craft set includes felt tip pens, sticker sheets, foil stickers, foam shapes, washi tape, printed paper, pipe cleaners, pom poms, colour-in poster, activity sheets and more! It even comes in a Hot Wheels Super Van themed box that you can colour in!

attributes.whats_in_box: 250+ Assorted Crafts Items including Sticker Rolls, Washi Tape, Pens, Pencils, Chenille Stems, Foam Shapes, Pom Poms, Cardboard Cars, Sticker Sheets, A4 Colouring Sheets, Sticker Book, Ink Stampers and Ink Pad

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
